name: My First
overview: Rania, a new student at Jakarta's elite University, who is dating for the first time, describes in her sketchbook the times she saw, admired, had a crush, got acquainted and finally got close to Adam, a celebrity on campus, until their relationship was blocked by Mei, her boyfriend. Adam. Falling in love, broken heart, cheated on, betrayed, blind jealousy and so on. Will have a different story when everything is done FIRST TIME.

trailers.title: Trailer | My First  - TrueID Original Series
